text: Russian cyber threat also affects enterprising Netherlands. [Knowledge article](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/cybersecurity/actueel.html). [Cyber attack](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/cybersecurity/cyberattack/index.html). 06/30/2025 • 2 minutes reading. ABN AMRO Editorial.

metadata.source_title: Russian cyber threat also affects enterprising Netherlands

text: Since 2024, a new name has emerged in the cyber espionage landscape: Laundry Bear. The AIVD and MIVD discovered this Russian cyber actor.

metadata.source_title: Russian cyber threat also affects enterprising Netherlands

text: Laundry Bear collects sensitive information from European institutions and companies, including in the Netherlands. In the first known attack, employee business contact information was stolen. Since then, several organizations have been targeted by this sophisticated but subtle group.

metadata.source_title: Russian cyber threat also affects enterprising Netherlands

text: Living off the Land Methods. They use techniques such as [phishing](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/cybersecurity/wat-is-phishing.html), password spraying and so-called Living off the Land methods. Existing software in an organization is abused without the immediate need for malicious software, which makes detection difficult. The group also uses stolen authentication tokens, such as cookies, obtained through criminal marketplaces.

metadata.source_title: Russian cyber threat also affects enterprising Netherlands

text:
What can you do? To protect your organization you can, among other things:
Use multi-factor authentication (MFA). Monitor systems for suspicious activities. Working with a zero-trust architecture. Conduct regular security audits. Better secure email traffic and train employees to recognize phishing.

metadata.source_title: Russian cyber threat also affects enterprising Netherlands

text: The threat from these types of groups is never over. Vigilance, up-to-date security and employee awareness are crucial. This article was produced in collaboration with [Samen Digitaal Veilig](https://www.samendigitaalveilig.nl/).

metadata.source_title: Russian cyber threat also affects enterprising Netherlands

text: Take cyber measures yourself or report fraud? About 1 in 5 entrepreneurs is confronted with cybercrime. Such a cyber incident can have major consequences for business operations, customers, suppliers or reputation. Taking appropriate measures is therefore important for every company.
